title: Open letter: citizens asked for a fur ban four years ago, will the European Commission deliver? [Promoted Content]
summary_full: Four years after the launch of the ECI Fur Free Europe, EU citizens are loud and clear: only a ban on fur farms and fur products on the EU market makes ethical, economic and democratic sense.
summary_public: Four years after the launch of the ECI Fur Free Europe, EU citizens are loud and clear: only a ban on fur farms and fur products on the EU market makes ethical, economic and democratic sense.
